description: The `EnableLongPathSupport` DSC resource is used to enable or disable Windows long path support.
author: Microsoft Corporation

embedded.description: The `EnableLongPathSupport` DSC resource is used to enable or disable Windows long path support.

SID.title: SID
SID.description: The security identifier. This is a key property and should not be set manually.

Ensure.title: Ensure
Ensure.description:
Specifies whether long path support should be enabled (`Present`) or disabled (`Absent`).
        Defaults to `Present`.

embedded.title: Microsoft.Windows.Developer/EnableLongPathSupport
